home.heroSubtitle: Your intelligent guide to the democratic process. Learn about voter registration, voting procedures, timelines, and more — all in simple, clear language.
home.featuresSubtitle: Interactive tools designed to make civic education accessible and engaging for everyone.

features.f1Desc: Ask anything about elections. Get clear, accurate answers powered by AI with follow-up support.
features.f2Desc: Walk through the entire election process from registration to results.
features.f3Desc: Visual election timelines with key dates, deadlines, and milestones.
features.f4Desc: "What if I miss registration?" Explore real scenarios and consequences.
features.f5Desc: Find your nearest polling station with Google Maps integration.
features.f6Desc: Earn badges as you learn. Track your civic knowledge journey.

home.ctaTitle: Ready to Become a Civic Expert?
home.ctaDesc: Start your journey to understanding democracy. Ask questions, explore timelines, and earn your civic badges.
